title: Paving Block Calculator
shortDescription: Calculate how many paving blocks, edging and bedding material you need for a driveway, path or patio.
metaTitle: Paving Block Calculator - Estimate Blocks, Packs and Edging
metaDescription: Estimate how many paving blocks you need for your driveway, walkway or patio. Calculate blocks, packs or pallets, and edging meters in seconds.
intro: Use this paving block calculator to quickly estimate how much paving you need for a driveway, path or patio. Enter the surface area, block size, waste allowance, pack coverage and edging ratio to get a practical material estimate.
overview: This tool helps you answer the key question: how many paving blocks do I need? It converts your surface area and block dimensions into an estimated block count, then calculates how many packs or pallets to buy and how much edging is required.
howItWorks: Enter the total area in square meters.
Add the paving block width and length in centimeters.
Set the waste percentage for cuts and fitting losses.
Enter the coverage of one pack or pallet in square meters.
Specify edging needed per 1 m² to estimate border length.
Review the calculated blocks, packs or pallets, and edging meters.
useCases: Estimating materials for a garden path or sidewalk.
Checking how many pallets of blocks to order.
Budgeting edging for a patio renovation.
Comparing paving material needs before requesting quotes.

examples.title: Typical driveway estimate
examples.input: Area 40 m², block 20 x 10 cm, waste 8%, coverage 6.5 m² per pack, edging 0.6 m per m²
examples.output: Estimated blocks, packs and edging for a standard driveway layout.
examples.description: A fast way to size a common residential paving project.

examples.title: Patio material check
examples.input: Area 25 m², block 20 x 20 cm, waste 10%, coverage 5 m² per pallet, edging 0.4 m per m²
examples.output: Material quantities for a small patio.
examples.description: Useful before ordering from a supplier.

faq.question: How do I calculate how many paving blocks I need?
faq.answer: Multiply the area by 10,000 to get square centimeters, divide by the block area in square centimeters, then add the waste percentage. The calculator does this automatically for you.

faq.question: Why should I add waste?
faq.answer: Waste covers cuts, breakage and fitting losses. For most projects, 5% to 10% is common, but complex layouts may need more.

faq.question: Does this calculator tell me how many packs or pallets to buy?
faq.answer: Yes. After calculating the required paving area, it divides the result by the coverage of one pack or pallet and rounds up.

faq.question: Can I use it for a driveway, path or terrace?
faq.answer: Yes. It works for any rectangular or custom paving area as long as you know the total surface size and block dimensions.

seo.title: Paving Block Calculator
seo.description: Calculate how many paving blocks, packs or pallets, and edging meters you need for a driveway, path or patio.
keywords: how many paving blocks do I need
